name: Orange Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the unpeeled orange into quarters and finely chop in a blender or food processor.
2. In a saucepan, combine 1/4 cup sugar and water. Bring to boil over medium heat, stirring until sugar is dissolved. Add chopped orange and cook until thick, about fifteen minutes. Remove from heat and let cool.
3. Sift together remaining sugar, flour, baking powder, soda, and salt into a bowl.
4. Mix egg, milk, oil, and orange mixture in another bowl.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients and stir until just blended. Do not overmix.
6. Pour batter into a greased 9x5-inch loaf pan or 6-cup mold.
7. Bake at 325 degrees for 55 minutes.
8. Let cool on a rack. Wrap well and refrigerate overnight.
